title: Planning & Strategy
description: We'll collaborate to map out your project's goals, target audience, and key functionalities. We'll discuss things like architecture, navigation, and content requirements.

title: Design & Prototyping
description: I'll translate the strategy into wireframes, polished UI, and interactive prototypes — so you can feel the product before a single line of code ships.

title: Development & Launch
description: This is where the magic happens. I cue my lo-fi playlist and translate the approved design into clean, scalable code, shipping it to production with care.
